title: Positive Flow: Navigate to Music History Screen
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen.
expected_result: The Music History screen is displayed with a header showing 'Music history' and a list of music history entries.

title: Negative Flow: No Internet Connection
preconditions: Ensure there is no internet connection.
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Simulate no internet connection.
expected_result: The Music History screen displays a message indicating no internet connection.

title: Boundary/Validation: Empty Music History
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Ensure there are no music history entries.
expected_result: The Music History screen displays a message indicating no music history entries.

title: Toggles State: Swipe to View More Entries
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Swipe up to view more music history entries.
expected_result: Additional music history entries are displayed.

title: Clickable Buttons: Navigation Bar
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Click on the back arrow in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen.

title: Accessibility/Usability: Screen Reader
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Use a screen reader to navigate through the screen.
expected_result: The screen reader correctly reads out the content of the Music History screen.

title: Usability: Interruption/Resume
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Simulate a phone call interruption.
expected_result: The Music History screen is resumed after the interruption.

title: Data Persistence: Resume from Previous Session
test_steps: Open the Music App. | Navigate to the Music History screen. | Close the app and reopen it.
expected_result: The Music History screen displays the same music history entries from the previous session.
